caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug with red text that reads "DO TALK OUT". Behind him, a white wall features a repeating logo with five stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE", and a blue sign above reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". The man wears a gold watch on his left wrist. Throughout the sequence, he is engaged in conversation, looking toward someone off-screen to his right. He begins with a neutral expression, then transitions into a smile and a laugh, with his mouth open in the final frames as he continues to speak and gesture slightly with his hands.
